markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce and demo Scrunch AI platform to GrowthX.ai, discussing features, pricing, and potential collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Scrunch AI tracks brand mentions across AI platforms, offering insights on presence, position, and sentiment](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $300/month for 3 orgs, $500/month for 5 orgs, with 750 prompts shared across platforms](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai expressed interest in API access and white-labeling options for potential client use](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Scrunch AI is rapidly growing, expanding from 3 to 12 team members since February launch](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

## Topics

### Scrunch AI Platform Overview

  - [Monitors brand mentions across AI platforms (ChatGPT, Google AI, Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Key metrics: Presence (mention frequency), Position (placement in response), Sentiment](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [Prompts run every 3 days against selected AI models](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [Features include AI traffic analysis, source tracking, and AI-generated insights](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)

### Data Visualization and Analysis

  - [AI traffic tab: Looker Studio dashboard for Google Analytics integration](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Sources tab: Ranks top-referenced sources by AI, with impact scoring](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Insights tab: Flags opportunities and recommendations for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [Site audit feature: Shows how AI perceives webpage content](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)

### Prompt Management and Generation

  - [Users can manually add, bulk upload, or AI-generate prompts](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Prompts can be tied to specific personas or key topics](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Best practices depend on business breadth and focus areas](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)

### Pricing and Package Details

  - [Starting at $300/month for 3 orgs, $500/month for 5 orgs](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [750 prompts shared across chosen platforms](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [Bulk discounts available for more brands/prompts](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Upcoming: Industry-wide shared prompts at no extra cost](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)

### API and Integration

  - [API access available (not publicly announced)](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
  - [Allows export of dashboard data, responses, and citation frequency](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)
  - [Detailed API guide to be provided separately](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=1912.0)

### Company Background

  - [Scrunch AI launched from beta in February](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Grown from 3 to 12 team members in recent months](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=2227.0)
  - [Serving diverse clients from large enterprises to small businesses](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Scrunch to set up private Slack channel for GrowthX.ai team](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=2314.0)
  - [Send detailed pricing information in writing](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=2203.0)
  - [Provide API access guide and additional technical details](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=1912.0)
  - [Explore potential for webinar collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=2330.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai to review and refine prompt strategy for optimal platform use](https://fathom.video/share/aZ5WF3Sxs_nENk-U-y5oFHVFKiGfqqbj?tab=summary&timestamp=2102.0)
